items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟Small Size🆕Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and soft new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crinkled body, an adjustable donut chain, and a soft-touch handle. This small size is crafted from Nappa sheep leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, plus an extra chain to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure* Internal zip pocket *Unlined* loewe hot stamping or silver stamping.

items.name_en: Loewe 🔥New Arrival🆕 Soft Smooth Calfskin and Jacquard Cubi Handbag
items.name_cn:
Loewe 🔥New Arrival🆕 Soft Smooth Calfskin and Jacquard Cubi Handbag
The Cubi crossbody bag is a spacious and soft bag that easily adapts to the body. Features a Loewe jacquard strap. Crossbody shoulder carry*adjustable strap*zipper closure*calfskin zipper pull*internal slip pocket*fits a 13-inch laptop*herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:44*30*18cm
Model:062213

items.name_en: Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
items.name_cn:
Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
Model 3001A
Made from imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, it is soft and supple. The precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, suitable for hand-carry or crossbody (multiple uses). Detachable long shoulder strap. Textile lining, Small 24-14-11
